question.label: Thread follow
question.name: still unsure what — can you say more about what that means for you right now?
question.description: Runtime thread-follow injected because planner did not follow substantive answer.

answer: I do ask for help sometimes, but I worry about sounding slow.

assessment.note: He is asking for help but holding back out of fear of sounding slow, which signals strong disengaging friction around speaking up.

history.answer_excerpt: The hardest part is changing direction late and feeling like I missed something.
The hardest part is changing direction late and feeling like I missed something.
I am still unsure what good really looks like here week to week.
